name: Alleycat
description: Attacks victims directly, feeding in the chaos of physical confrontation. Gains Celerity ● and 3 dots of Contacts (criminal). Specialty: Brawl (Grappling) or Intimidation (Stickups). Cost: −1 Humanity at creation.

name: Bagger
description: Feeds on bagged or stolen blood from blood banks, hospitals, or black-market suppliers. Gains Larceny ● and 2 dots of Contacts (medical or criminal). Cannot reduce Hunger below 2 from bagged blood.

name: Blood Leech
description: Feeds exclusively on other Kindred. Gains Fortitude ● and a Herd dot (Kindred). Deeply distrusted by Kindred society. Cost: −2 Humanity at creation and 2 dots of Enemies (Kindred).

name: Consensualist
description: Feeds only with full mortal consent, framing the Kiss as medical donation or spiritual rite. Gains Medicine ● and 1 dot of Contacts (medical). Starts with +1 Humanity. Cost: 1 dot of Herd (mortals who withdraw consent).

name: Farmer
description: Feeds exclusively on animals. Gains Animalism ● and Animal Ken Specialty (Feeding). Cannot reduce Hunger below 2 from animals alone.

name: Graverobber
description: Feeds on the recently dead or dying in morgues, hospitals, and disaster sites. Gains Occult ● and 1 dot of Contacts (morticians or emergency services). Cannot reduce Hunger below 2 from corpses.

name: Osiris
description: Feeds on fans, followers, and cult members who offer blood willingly as devotion. Gains Fame ● and Herd ●●●. Cost: 2 dots of Status (seen as a liability by sect).

name: Sandman
description: Feeds on sleeping victims, leaving no trace or memory. Gains Obfuscate ● and Stealth Specialty (Feeding). Cost: 1 dot of Herd (victims who eventually notice).

name: Scene Queen
description: Feeds at social gatherings — clubs, galas, underground scenes. Gains Fame ● and 2 dots of Status (mortal social scene). Specialty: Persuasion (Seduction) or Etiquette (Specific Scene). Cost: 1 dot of Enemies.

name: Siren
description: Feeds through seduction and intimacy. Gains Presence ● and Specialty: Persuasion (Seduction). Cost: 1 dot of Herd (abandoned lovers) and −1 Humanity.

name: Cleaver
description: Feeds secretly from an unwitting mortal family — relatives, partners, close friends — who have no idea the predator is a vampire. Gains Herd ●●● (the family) and Resources ●. Cost: Dark Secret (Vampire).

name: Extortionist
description: Feeds on victims through coercion — blackmail, threats, protection rackets. Gains Intimidation ● and Resources ●●. Specialty: Intimidation (Coercion). Cost: 1 dot of Enemies and −1 Humanity.
